name: website-baseline
description: Add an applicability-aware web quality checklist without new runtime dependencies.
docs: Assign ownership for the baseline or merge it into an existing product spec.
Record which conditional requirements apply before enforcing them.
Link deterministic items to existing automated checks where practical.
verify: Run the target repo's normal quality gate and browser audit.
notes: This kit does not certify standards or legal compliance.
Consult the upstream Website Specification for current standards links and implementation guidance.
